text:

Author: mmoll

Log:
  sysutils/puppet: update to 3.8.3

  - update to 3.8.3 [1]
  - refactor manifest check in puppetmaster rc.d script [2]
  - bring in the pkgng package provider also used in Puppet 4 [3]
  - take maintainership
